case_title: AMEERA SHAW VS. SACRAMENTO TRADITIONAL JAZZ SOCIETY

THIS MATTER CAME ON CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR VENUE CHALLENGE. MOTION IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AMEERA SHAW. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO TRADITIONAL JAZZ SOCIETY'S REPRESENTATIVE DAVID A. BECKER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
